mandatory_clauses.description: Full names and addresses of both employer and employee
Nature of the work for which the employee can be called up
How and how far in advance the employer must notify the employee of a shift (minimum 4 days' notice per BW 7:628a)
Employee's right to refuse a call-up if not given adequate notice
Hourly pay rate meeting or exceeding minimum wage for the worker's age
Vakantiegeld of at least 8% of gross earnings, stated per hour or accrued
After 12 months, the average hours of the preceding 3 months become the guaranteed minimum (BW 7:628a(9))
